All actions are confined to expected system paths, use trusted binaries, and are focused solely on fontconfig functionality.

<details>
The PKGBUILD file defines a package based on Ubuntu's patched version of fontconfig, sourced from Ubuntu's official launchpad.net archive. The sources are fetched from `https://launchpad.net/ubuntu/+archive/primary`, which is the legitimate and expected upstream for Ubuntu-derived packages.
